## Source: amazon-inspector (367514ccbb2bca5ad75eda53d2890a583e465233d2b6915acffa09d299405277)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (a10cd169aad2eb0020abda62fd70a8927f63dfe4ae1891c9256882a03019cf0d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'earthengine-api' @ 9.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
